'''dhafuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:aracari|aracari]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-f-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:aracari|aracari]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhafuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || dhæfichith || dhæfichij || dhæfichish || dhæfichi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || dhafufuchuth || dhafufuchuj || dhafufuchush || dhafufuchu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || dhafuchuth || dhafuchuj || dhafuchush || dhafuchu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || dhafufchufth || dhafufchufj || dhafufchufsh || dhafufchuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || dhafuchuthu || dhafuchuju || dhafuchushu || dhafuchuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || dhafuchuth || dhafuchuj || dhafuchush || dhafuchu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || dhafuchuthul || dhafuchujul || dhafuchushul || dhafuchukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || dhafuchuuthuthu || dhafuchuujuju || dhafuchuushushu || dhafuchuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || dhafuchuthun || dhafuchujun || dhafuchushun || dhafuchukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || dhafuchuthuoro || dhafuchujuoro || dhafuchushuoro || dhafuchukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
